products.name: WQM-1
products.description: 6-channel water quality monitoring HAT for Raspberry Pi Zero 2W. LoRaWAN, GPS, offline SQLite storage, relay control.

products.name: BlueSignal Cloud
products.description: Real-time water quality monitoring platform. Manage sensors, track data, receive alerts.

products.name: Nutrient Credit Marketplace
products.description: Marketplace for verified water quality nutrient credits. Connects distributed water producers with utility demand.
